nodes.name: Black-lored cisticola
nodes.summary: The black-lored cisticola (Cisticola nigriloris) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Malawi, Tanzania, and Zambia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References
